rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 7, 2015, line 1. DEFENDANT KARI RILEY's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Continued to May 21, 2015 per stipulation of the parties. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANN KONSTIN VS. DELAWARE LAKEWOOD APARTMENTS LLC et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs Notice Of Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Delaware Lakewood Apartments, Llc And Cal-American Corporation And Their Attorneys
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 7, 2015, line 2. PLAINTIFF ANN KONSTIN's Motion To Compel Discovery Responses And For Monetary Sanctions Against Defendants Delaware Lakewood Apartments, Llc And Cal-American Corporation And Their Attorneys Transferred to Department 301 to be heard on May 20, 2015 at 9:00 a.m. Plaintiff's Motion to Compel Further Responses to Form Interrogatories currently set for hearing on May 20, 2015 in Department 501 shall also be heard in Department 301 at 9:00 a.m. on May 20, 2015. Parties shall provide courtesy copies of their filings to Department 301 forthwith. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: DENNIS COX VS. ALINA GABRIELA MIHAI ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion To Compel Answers, Without Objections To Form Interrogatories Set No 1; Form Interrogatories - General Set No 1; Requests For Admissions Set No 1 Propounded On Alina Gabriela Mihai; For Requests For Admissions, Set No 1 Propounded On Alina Gabriela Mihai To Be Deemed Admitted; And For Award Of Monetary Sanctions
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Thursday, May 7, 2015, line 6. PLAINTIFF DENNIS COX's Motion To Discovery Responses GRANTED, subject to opposition. Sanctions granted in the amount of $450. = (501/REQ)
